'''zhayosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headbin|headbin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headbin|headbin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhayosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæyesheth|zhæyesheth]] || [[word:zhæyeshej|zhæyeshej]] || [[word:zhæyeshesh|zhæyeshesh]] || [[word:zhæyeshe|zhæyeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhayoyoshoth|zhayoyoshoth]] || [[word:zhayoyoshoj|zhayoyoshoj]] || [[word:zhayoyoshosh|zhayoyoshosh]] || [[word:zhayoyosho|zhayoyosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhayoshoth|zhayoshoth]] || [[word:zhayoshoj|zhayoshoj]] || [[word:zhayoshosh|zhayoshosh]] || [[word:zhayosho|zhayosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhayofshoth|zhayofshoth]] || [[word:zhayofshoj|zhayofshoj]] || [[word:zhayofshosh|zhayofshosh]] || [[word:zhayofshof|zhayofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhayoshotho|zhayoshotho]] || [[word:zhayoshojo|zhayoshojo]] || [[word:zhayoshosho|zhayoshosho]] || [[word:zhayoshoko|zhayoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhayoshoth|zhayoshoth]] || [[word:zhayoshoj|zhayoshoj]] || [[word:zhayoshosh|zhayoshosh]] || [[word:zhayosho|zhayosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhayoshothol|zhayoshothol]] || [[word:zhayoshojol|zhayoshojol]] || [[word:zhayoshoshol|zhayoshoshol]] || [[word:zhayoshokol|zhayoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhayoshothotho|zhayoshothotho]] || [[word:zhayoshojojo|zhayoshojojo]] || [[word:zhayoshoshosho|zhayoshoshosho]] || [[word:zhayoshoko|zhayoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhayoshothon|zhayoshothon]] || [[word:zhayoshojon|zhayoshojon]] || [[word:zhayoshoshon|zhayoshoshon]] || [[word:zhayoshokon|zhayoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhayoshothoro|zhayoshothoro]] || [[word:zhayoshojoro|zhayoshojoro]] || [[word:zhayoshoshoro|zhayoshoshoro]] || [[word:zhayoshokoro|zhayoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
